summary:
Lua 5.3 came with a nice UTF-8 support library internally boundled.
This is that same library packaged as a standalone library, which can be used by any version of Lua (5.1, 5.2 and LuaJIT).
Copyright (C) 1994-2015 Lua.org, PUC-Rio, 2015 LOVE Development Team.
raw_content:
Lua 5.3 came with a nice UTF-8 support library internally boundled.
This is that same library packaged as a standalone library, which can be used by any version of Lua (5.1, 5.2 and LuaJIT).
Copyright (C) 1994-2015 Lua.org, PUC-Rio, 2015 LOVE Development Team.
generated_summary: lutf8 is a library for Unicode support complete usually used in the fields of unicode.
phase1: A Lua library for handling Unicode strings and encoding/decoding in UTF-8 format
phase2: Provides functions for converting between Lua strings and UTF-8 encoded strings, including encoding and decoding
phase3: Used for text processing tasks involving Unicode characters and UTF-8 encoding/decoding in Lua
